## 2.2.2.I. PI #9

### What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?

Ongoing national civil-military initiatives

Enabled the technical capabilities for applying VPA, working on implementation of Dynamic RAD in Switzerland and in the frame of the CIV MIL ASM System we are implementing a fully integrated ASM data transfer from input by airspace user until output to airspace user as well as to ATCO radar.

Monitoring of effectiveness

Military mission effectivness increased over the last years and fulfillment of planned missions is improving. CH NSA measure and analyze the PIs in a regular basis in order to better assess (and improve, if necessary) the effectiveness of national FUA processes.
